title: Organization
description: A logical organization grouping teams and services

github_cycle_time_trend.title: PR Cycle Time Trend
github_cycle_time_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_pr_cycle_time // 0) - (.properties.github_pr_cycle_time_weekly // 0)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end

github_stale_pr_share_percent.title: Stale PR Share (%)
github_stale_pr_share_percent.calculation: if (.properties.github_open_prs != null and .properties.github_open_prs != 0) then (.properties.github_stale_prs_7d / .properties.github_open_prs) * 100 else 0 end
